calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42am and concluding at 9:57am.

Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center L.P. appearing via zoom represented by John Byrne.
Witness for the Plaintiff Darren Iverson appearing via zoom.
Defendant Fuji SFC 2203 LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court examins witness Darren Iverson regarding statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, and against Defendant Fuji SFC 2203 LLC as follows:

Damages: $145,638.04
Holdover damages: $54,000.00
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $634.00
Security Deposit: -$26,813.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $176,284.04

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
